neighborhoods.name: Lorton Station
neighborhoods.description: Town-center development around the Lorton VRE commuter rail station with grocery-anchored retail and townhomes

housing.predominantType: Townhomes and mid-rise apartments around the station

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Lorton. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Laurel Hill / Workhouse Arts Center
neighborhoods.description: Newer single-family homes built on the former Lorton Reformatory grounds with the Workhouse Arts Center as the cultural anchor
neighborhoods.character: Newer homes on historic grounds, arts center
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Lorton's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Gunston / Mason Neck
neighborhoods.description: More rural southeastern Fairfax County with larger lots, Mason Neck State Park access, and lower price points
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Pohick / South Run
neighborhoods.description: Established neighborhoods near Pohick Bay Regional Park and South Run Rec Center with mature trees and active community pools
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
